## Type of change

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added / updated and passing (`pnpm test` / `pytest tests/`)
- [ ] TypeScript type check clean (`pnpm typecheck`)
- [ ] No new dependencies added without discussion (or: dependency choice justified below)
- [ ] Cassette hash algorithm unchanged — or cross-language parity verified with `hash-vectors.json`
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated if this is a user-facing change
